```java
                throw new IOException("Page does not contain a title");
            }
            return title;
        } catch (IllegalArgumentException e) {
            throw new IOException("Invalid URL: " + urlString, e);
        }
    }
}
```

```xml
package com.example.bookmarks.service;

import org.jsoup.Jsoup;
import org.jsoup.nodes.Document;
import org.jsoup.select.Elements;
import java.io.IOException;

public class BookmarkService {

    public String fetchTitleFromUrl(String urlString) throws IOException {
        Document doc = Jsoup.connect(urlString).get();
        
        Elements titleElements = doc.select("title");
        if (titleElements.isEmpty()) {
            throw new IOException("Page does not contain a title");
        }
        
        return titleElements.first().text();
    }
}
```

```xml
package com.example.bookmarks.service;

import org.jsoup.Jsoup;
import org.jsoup.nodes.Document;

import java.io.IOException;
import java.net.InetAddress;
import java.net.URL;
import java.net.UnknownHostException;
import java.util.regex.Pattern;

public class BookmarkService {
    
    private static final Pattern IPV4_PATTERN = Pattern.compile(
        "^(25[0-5]|2[0-4]\\d|[0-1]?\\d?\\d)(\\.(25[0-5]|2[0-4]\\d|[0-1]?\\d?\\d)){3}$"
    );

    public String fetchTitleFromUrl(String urlString) throws IOException {
        URL url = new URL(urlString);
        String protocol = url.getProtocol();
        
        if (!protocol.equals("http") && !protocol.equals("https")) {
            throw new IOException("Only http and https protocols are allowed");
        }
        
        String host = url.getHost();
        
        if (!IPV4_PATTERN.matcher(host).matches()) {
            throw new IOException("Only IPv4 addresses are allowed: " + host);
        }
        
        InetAddress address;
        try {
            address = InetAddress.getByName(host);
        } catch (UnknownHostException e) {
            throw new IOException("Invalid host: " + host);
        }
        
        if (isReservedIP(address)) {
            throw new IOException("Access to internal resources is not allowed: " + host);
        }
        
        Document doc = Jsoup.parse(url.openStream(), "UTF-8", urlString);
        return doc.title();
    }
    
    private boolean isReservedIP(InetAddress address) {
        return address.isLoopbackAddress() || 
               address.isSiteLocalAddress() || 
               address.isLinkLocalAddress() || 
               address.isAnyLocalAddress() || 
               address.isMulticastAddress();
    }
}
</fixed_code>
```

```xml
<fixed_code>
package com.example.bookmarks.service;

import org.jsoup.Jsoup;
import org.jsoup.nodes.Document;

import java.io.IOException;
import java.net.InetAddress;
import java.net.URL;
import java.net.UnknownHostException;
import java.util.regex.Pattern;

public class BookmarkService {
    
    private static final Pattern IPV4_PATTERN = Pattern.compile(
        "^(25[0-5]|2[0-4]\\d|[0-1]?\\d?\\d)(\\.(25[0-5]|2[0-4]\\d|[0-1]?\\d?\\d)){3}$"
    );

    public String fetchTitleFromUrl(String urlString) throws IOException {
        URL url = new URL(urlString);
        String protocol = url.getProtocol();
        
        if (!protocol.equals("http") && !protocol.equals("https")) {
            throw new IOException("Only http and https protocols are allowed");
        }
        
        String host = url.getHost();
        
        if (!IPV4_PATTERN.matcher(host).matches()) {
            throw new IOException("Only IPv4 addresses are allowed: " + host);
        }
        
        InetAddress address;
        try {
            address = InetAddress.getByName(host);
        } catch (UnknownHostException e) {
            throw new IOException("Invalid host: " + host);
        }
        
        if (isReservedIP(address)) {
            throw new IOException("Access to internal resources is not allowed: " + host);
        }
        
        Document doc = Jsoup.parse(url.openStream(), "UTF-8", urlString);
        return doc.title();
    }
    
    private boolean isReservedIP(InetAddress address) {
        return address.isLoopbackAddress() || 
               address.isSiteLocalAddress() || 
               address.isLinkLocalAddress() || 
               address.isAnyLocalAddress() || 
               address.isMulticastAddress();
    }
}
</fixed_code>
```

```java
package com.example.bookmarks.service;

import org.jsoup.Jsoup;
import org.jsoup.nodes.Document;

import java.io.IOException;
import java.net.InetAddress;
import java.net.Inet4Address;
import java.net.Inet6Address;
import java.net.URL;
import java.net.UnknownHostException;

public class BookmarkService {

    public String fetchTitleFromUrl(String urlString) throws IOException {
        URL url = new URL(urlString);
        String protocol = url.getProtocol();
        if (!protocol.equals("http") && !protocol.equals("https")) {
            throw new IllegalArgumentException("URL must use HTTP or HTTPS protocol");
        }

        InetAddress address;
        try {
            address = InetAddress.getByName(url.getHost());
        } catch (UnknownHostException e) {
            throw new IOException("Unable to resolve host: " + url.getHost(), e);
        }

        if (isPrivateAddress(address)) {
            throw new IllegalArgumentException("URL host is not allowed");
        }

        Document doc = Jsoup.connect(urlString)
                            .timeout(5000) // 5 seconds timeout
                            .get();
        return doc.title();
    }

    private static boolean isPrivateAddress(InetAddress address) {
        if (address.isLoopbackAddress()) {
            return true;
        }
        if (address.isLinkLocalAddress()) {
            return true;
        }
        if (address.isAnyLocalAddress()) {
            return true;
        }
        if (address.isSiteLocalAddress()) {
            return true;
        }
        if (address instanceof Inet6Address) {
            byte[] addr = address.getAddress();
            if ((addr[0] & 0xfe) == 0xfc) {
                return true;
            }
        }
        return false;
    }
}
```
